en.save_count: How many times settings were saved/updated.
en.last_saved_at: Timestamp of the last settings save.
en.last_saved_values_json: JSON snapshot of values saved most recently.
en.settings_showcase_action_message: Message returned from the passVariablesExample action.
en.settings_showcase_action_status: Status returned from the passVariablesExample action.
en.settings_showcase_action_save_count: Current save counter returned by the passVariablesExample action.
en.settings_showcase_action_snapshot: Compact JSON snapshot returned by the passVariablesExample action.
